description: A designed graphic built from a screenshot of an ABC 7News ('ON YOUR SIDE') online news article, lightly customized with an added handwritten-style overlay. At the top is the navy ABC7 News header bar with a hamburger menu icon. The black bold headline reads 'SEE IT: Historic DC fountain flows again after 7 years', with a red, slanted handwritten-marker overlay added across the lower-right of the headline saying 'Thanks to President Donald J. Trump!'. Byline 'by Jessica James | Mon, May 18, 2026 at 1:11 PM', updated timestamp, and a lede paragraph: 'WASHINGTON (7News) — Water is flowing again at some of Washington's historic fountains, including a major landmark in Meridian Hill Park.' The lower half is a color photograph of the multi-tiered cascading fountain at Meridian Hill Park with flowing water, stone arches, green trees, and a person standing at the reflecting basin. The propaganda technique is borrowed credibility from a local news outlet plus an editorial handwritten attribution crediting Trump for restoring the fountain, framing the administration as making the capital beautiful again. Target audience: DC-area residents and general public, reinforcing a 'promises kept / beautification' narrative.
notable_text: SEE IT: Historic DC fountain flows again after 7 years / Thanks to President Donald J. Trump!
